# Xpress Car Care LLC
> Luxury car care services at affordable prices in Auburn, AL. Detailing, washing, and specialty services for cars, trucks, ATVs, boats, and RVs.

## Business
- Name: Xpress Car Care LLC
- Type: AutoWash
- Phone: (334) 854-8147
- Address: 517 Webster Road, Auburn, AL 36832
- Area Served: Auburn, Opelika, and Lee County, AL
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/xpresscarcare/

## Services
- Basic Exterior Wash
- Interior Detailing
- Premium Detail
- Ultimate Detail
- Pet Hair Removal
- Exterior Polish
- ATV Detail
- Boat Detailing
- RV Detailing
- Fleet Washing

## Frequently Asked Questions
**How much does car detailing cost in Auburn AL?**
Our detailing packages start at $30 for a basic exterior wash and range up to $250 for our Ultimate Detail. Interior-only details start at $125. We offer competitive luxury-quality detailing at prices you will not find at chain car washes.

**How long does a full car detail take?**
A basic wash takes about 1 hour. A full interior and exterior detail typically takes 3 to 4 hours. Our Ultimate Detail package, which includes clay bar and finishing polish, takes approximately 4 hours.

**Do you detail boats, ATVs, and RVs?**
Yes. We detail all vehicle types including cars, trucks, ATVs, boats, RVs, and commercial fleet vehicles. Call us for a custom quote on specialty vehicles.

**Do you offer fleet washing services?**
Yes. We offer fleet washing programs for businesses with multiple vehicles. Regular fleet washing keeps your vehicles looking professional and maintains resale value. Call for a fleet pricing quote.

**Where are you located in Auburn AL?**
We are located at 517 Webster Road, Auburn, AL 36832. We are open Monday through Friday 9am to 6pm and Saturday 9am to 5pm. Closed Sunday.
